title: Elasticity
summary: 9609 A Level — PED, YED, XED for marketing decisions.
learningObjectives: Link elasticity to pricing and revenue.

simpleExplanation.title: How demand responds
simpleExplanation.summary: Elasticity measures sensitivity of demand to price, income, or other goods — guiding pricing and product mix.
steps: Elastic |PED| > 1: revenue falls if price rises.

sections.content: **Elasticity** (8.1.1) uses **9708 micro** tools in a **marketing** context. Show **calculation + decision**.
